beforeAfter.withoutDetail: "Where were we? Let me re-read everything..."
beforeAfter.withDetail: STATE.md + DECISION_LOG + semantic search. Resume exactly where you left off.
Hard metrics, tiered criteria, statistical significance. Nothing ships unverified.

beforeAfter.withoutDetail: Bug fixed Friday. Same bug Monday.

beforeAfter.withDetail: Write plan.md. Walk away. Come back to validated deliverables.

beforeAfter.withoutDetail: "Who decided to drop that feature? When? Why?"
beforeAfter.withDetail: Every decision, every gate, every agent action — timestamped and searchable.

beforeAfter.withoutDetail: AI configs mixed into the delivery repo.
beforeAfter.withDetail: Delivery repo contains zero ZO artifacts. Always.

beforeAfter.withoutDetail: "What's next? I guess we try training?"
beforeAfter.withDetail: Data → Features → Model → Training → Analysis → Packaging. Gated at every transition.

whatItsNot.is: A coordinated agent team that owns entire projects
An autonomous system you brief with a plan
An orchestration engine with memory, verification, and self-evolution
A specification-driven system — plan.md is precise, not simplified
A multi-session system with persistent memory and session recovery
Engineering discipline applied to AI coordination
